Professional Small Banner Frame Systems for Event & Trade Show Marketing

Our small outdoor banner frame system provides a portable, professional solution for displaying custom banners at events, trade shows, and outdoor marketing campaigns. This lightweight aluminum frame measures 51" W x 38" H when assembled, making it perfect for tabletop displays, small booth setups, and portable advertising applications.

Banner Frame Features & Benefits

  • Lightweight aluminum construction at only 9.5 lbs for easy transport
  • Quick assembly design for fast event setup and breakdown
  • Ball bungee attachment system secures grommeted banners firmly
  • Compact carrying case (49.25" W x 42.5" H x 10.25" D) for convenient storage
  • Weather-resistant frame suitable for indoor and outdoor use
  • Compatible with any grommeted banner (sold separately)

Small Banner Frame Dimensions

Assembled Frame: 51" Wide x 38" High x 24.75" Deep
Carrying Case: 49.25" W x 42.5" H x 10.25" D
Frame Weight: 9.5 pounds

This banner frame system is designed for businesses, organizations, and marketers who need a reliable, portable display solution for their custom banners. The frame accommodates standard banner sizes and provides professional presentation for any messaging.

Small Banner Frame Materials & Construction Specifications

Our small outdoor banner frame is constructed from high-quality materials designed for durability and portability in both indoor and outdoor environments.

Frame Construction Materials

  • Aluminum Tubing: Lightweight yet sturdy aluminum construction resists rust and corrosion
  • Steel Connectors: Heavy-duty steel joints provide secure frame assembly
  • Ball Bungee Fasteners: Included elastic ball bungees secure banner grommets to frame
  • Protective Case: Durable carrying case protects frame components during transport

Compatible Banner Materials

This frame system works with any grommeted banner material, including:

  • 13oz vinyl banners for outdoor durability
  • Mesh banners for wind-resistant applications
  • Fabric banners for indoor trade show displays
  • Canvas banners for premium presentation

The frame's ball bungee attachment system accommodates standard grommet spacing on custom banners. Banner material selection depends on your specific application and environmental conditions.

Banner Frame Setup & Assembly Options

The small outdoor banner frame system includes everything needed for professional banner display setup and is designed for quick assembly without tools.

Assembly Components Included

  • Aluminum frame tubing sections with quick-connect joints
  • Ball bungee fasteners for banner attachment
  • Assembly instructions and setup guide
  • Protective carrying case with foam inserts

Setup Configuration Options

  • Standard Assembly: 51" x 38" display area for most applications
  • Tabletop Display: Stable base design works on tables and flat surfaces
  • Ground Setup: Frame legs provide stability for floor placement
  • Portable Transport: Breaks down into compact carrying case

Banner Attachment Method

Banners attach to the frame using the included ball bungee system. Your custom banner must include grommets along the edges for proper attachment. Standard grommet spacing of 12-18 inches works best with this frame system.

Assembly typically takes 5-10 minutes, making this frame ideal for frequent setup and breakdown at multiple events or locations.

  • Standard production time for most frame orders

5 Business Days Saver Production

Save money on your banner frame order when your timeline allows for extended production.

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Same quality standards with longer production window
  • Ideal for bulk orders or future event preparation

Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. Turnaround begins from order confirmation. Contact our customer service team for specific timeline questions.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Artwork Requirements for Frame Display

To ensure proper fit and professional appearance with your small banner frame system, your custom banner must meet specific size and finishing requirements.

Banner Size Specifications

  • Recommended Size: 51" wide x 38" tall (matches frame dimensions)
  • Maximum Size: 52" wide x 39" tall for slight overlap
  • Minimum Size: 50" wide x 37" tall for proper tension
  • Bleed Area: Include 1" bleed on all sides for best results

Required Banner Finishing

  • Grommets Required: Banner must include grommets for ball bungee attachment
  • Grommet Spacing: 12-18 inches apart around banner perimeter
  • Grommet Size: Standard #2 or #4 grommets work best
  • Corner Reinforcement: Double-folded hems recommended for durability

File Specifications for Banner Printing

  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum at actual print size
  • File Format: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG/PNG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Fonts: Convert text to outlines or include font files

Design Considerations

  • Keep important text and graphics away from grommet areas
  • Design for viewing distance of 3-10 feet
  • Use high contrast colors for better readability
  • Consider banner material (vinyl, mesh, fabric) for design optimization

Note: Banner is sold separately. We offer custom banner printing services that include proper sizing and grommeting for frame compatibility.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Small Banner Frame Frequently Asked Questions

What size banner do I need for this frame?

The frame displays banners measuring 51" wide x 38" tall. Your banner should be this exact size or up to 1 inch larger in each dimension for proper fit and tension.

Does the banner come with the frame?

No, banners are sold separately. The frame system includes the aluminum frame, ball bungee fasteners, and carrying case. We offer custom banner printing services if you need a banner made for your frame.

How much does the banner frame weigh?

The complete frame system weighs only 9.5 pounds, making it very portable for events and trade shows. The carrying case adds approximately 2 pounds to the total weight.

Can this frame be used outdoors?

Yes, the aluminum construction is weather-resistant for outdoor use. However, the lightweight design is best suited for calm weather conditions. For windy areas, consider additional anchoring or a heavier frame system.

What type of banner material works best with this frame?

Any grommeted banner material will work, including vinyl, mesh, fabric, or canvas. The material choice depends on your application - vinyl for outdoor durability, mesh for wind resistance, or fabric for indoor trade shows.

How long does assembly take?

The frame assembles in 5-10 minutes without tools. The quick-connect joints and simple design make setup fast for events where time is important.

What's included with the frame system?

You receive the complete frame with all tubing and connectors, ball bungee fasteners for banner attachment, assembly instructions, and a protective carrying case with foam inserts.

Can I order multiple frames for a large event?

Yes, bulk pricing is available for multiple frame orders. Contact our customer service team for volume discounts and freight shipping options on large orders.

What if my banner gets damaged?

The frame accepts any properly sized grommeted banner, so you can easily replace damaged banners without replacing the entire frame system. We offer banner printing services for replacement banners.

Do you offer setup services?

The frame is designed for easy customer setup. However, for large events requiring multiple frames, we can recommend local setup services in major metropolitan areas.
